INTERMITTENT RAIN SHOWERS ... SHORT BURSTS OF HAIL...LIGHTNING... 0.34 INCHES BY 8 PM. THEN INTERMITTENT HEAVY RAIN... HAIL... LIGHTNING. FLASH FLOOD CAME DOWN DRAINAGE THROUGH PROPERTY FROM NORTHEAST STORM. WATER OVER THEIR BRIDGES... ABOUT EIGHT FEET. BEGAN TO SUBSIDE SLOWLY AFTER ABOUT 11 PM. RESIDUAL DRAINAGE RUN OFF TODAY. NOT MUCH STRUCTURAL DAMAGE WAS DONE TO BRIDGES... BUT GRAVEL WASTED AWAY FROM DRIVEWAY. SOME DAMAGE WAS REPORTED TO VARIOUS IRRIGATION SYSTEMS AND DITCHES TO NORTH.
